title: neatostema apulum
intro: Neatostema apulum, also known as Mountain Mint, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its clusters of small, white flowers and mint-like scent. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Neatostema apulum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce fever, and provide relief from headaches and respiratory issues. Neatostema apulum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
